name: RNA Column Extraction (Silica-based)

components.name: 1. 裂解：加 Buffer RLT + β-ME，涡旋
2. 匀浆（组织用匀浆器/针头 5–10 次）
3. 加等体积 70% 乙醇，混匀
4. 转移至 RNeasy 柱，离心 15 s ≥8,000×g
6. On-column DNase I 消化（可选）
components.note: 加 80 µL DNase I mix, 室温 15 min

components.name: 8. 洗涤 Buffer RPE 2× (500 µL)
components.note: 第二次离心 2 min 干燥膜

components.name: 9. 洗脱：30–50 µL RNase-free H₂O
components.note: 静置 1 min → 离心, 可重复一次提高产量

notes.en: Fast (~30 min) and reproducible. Lower yield than TRIzol but higher purity, ideal for RT-qPCR/RNA-seq. Small RNAs (<200 nt, including miRNA) require miRNA enrichment column. Tissue must be stored in RNAlater or flash-frozen in liquid nitrogen.
notes.zh: 快速（~30 min）且重现性好。产量低于 TRIzol，但纯度高，适合 RT-qPCR/RNA-seq。小量 RNA（<200 nt, 含 miRNA）需用 miRNA enrichment column。组织需在 RNAlater 中保存或液氮速冻。

ref: QIAGEN RNeasy Mini Handbook; Chomczynski & Sacchi (2006) Nat Protoc 1:581

usage.en: Extract total RNA from cells or tissues using silica column-based purification.
usage.zh: 硅胶柱法从细胞或组织中提取总 RNA。

briefSteps.en: Lyse cells in guanidinium buffer → add 70% ethanol → bind RNA to silica column → wash with RW1 → optional on-column DNase I digestion → wash with RPE twice → elute with RNase-free water → quantify by NanoDrop.
briefSteps.zh: 异硫氰酸胍缓冲液裂解细胞 → 加 70% 乙醇 → RNA 结合至硅胶柱 → RW1 洗涤 → 可选柱上 DNase I 消化 → RPE 洗涤两次 → RNase-free 水洗脱 → NanoDrop 定量。

detailedSteps.en: Add 350 µL Buffer RLT (supplemented with 10 µL/mL β-mercaptoethanol) to ≤5×10⁶ cells or ≤30 mg tissue. Vortex vigorously for 1 min to fully homogenize.
detailedSteps.zh: 向 ≤5×10⁶ 细胞或 ≤30 mg 组织中加入 350 µL Buffer RLT（含 10 µL/mL β-巯基乙醇）。剧烈涡旋 1 min 充分匀浆。

detailedSteps.en: For tissue: homogenize lysate with a rotor-stator or pass through a 20-gauge needle 5–10 times to shear genomic DNA and reduce viscosity. Centrifuge at ≥10,000×g for 3 min; transfer clear supernatant.
detailedSteps.zh: 组织样品：用匀浆器研磨或 20 号针头反复穿过 5–10 次以剪断基因组 DNA、降低粘度。≥10,000×g 离心 3 min，转移上清。

detailedSteps.en: Add an equal volume (350 µL) of 70% RNase-free ethanol to the lysate and mix by pipetting. Do not centrifuge.
detailedSteps.zh: 向裂解液中加入等体积（350 µL）70% 无 RNase 乙醇，吹打混匀。不要离心。

detailedSteps.en: Transfer up to 700 µL of the sample to an RNeasy spin column placed in a 2 mL collection tube. Centrifuge at ≥8,000×g for 15 seconds at RT. Discard flow-through.
detailedSteps.zh: 将最多 700 µL 样品转移至置于 2 mL 收集管中的 RNeasy 离心柱。室温 ≥8,000×g 离心 15 s，弃流出液。

detailedSteps.en: Add 700 µL Buffer RW1 to the column. Centrifuge at ≥8,000×g for 15 seconds. Discard flow-through and collection tube.
detailedSteps.zh: 向柱中加入 700 µL Buffer RW1，≥8,000×g 离心 15 s，弃流出液和收集管。

detailedSteps.en: Optional on-column DNase I digestion: pipette 80 µL DNase I incubation mix (10 µL DNase I stock + 70 µL Buffer RDD) directly onto the silica membrane. Incubate at room temperature for 15 min.
detailedSteps.zh: 可选柱上 DNase I 消化：将 80 µL DNase I 孵育液（10 µL DNase I 储液 + 70 µL Buffer RDD）直接加至硅胶膜上。室温孵育 15 min。

detailedSteps.en: Add 350 µL Buffer RW1. Centrifuge at ≥8,000×g for 15 seconds. Discard flow-through.
detailedSteps.zh: 加入 350 µL Buffer RW1，≥8,000×g 离心 15 s，弃流出液。

detailedSteps.en: Add 500 µL Buffer RPE. Centrifuge at ≥8,000×g for 15 seconds. Discard flow-through. Repeat with another 500 µL RPE and centrifuge for 2 min to dry the membrane.
detailedSteps.zh: 加入 500 µL Buffer RPE，≥8,000×g 离心 15 s，弃流出液。再加 500 µL RPE 离心 2 min 干燥膜。

detailedSteps.en: Transfer column to a fresh 1.5 mL RNase-free tube. Pipette 30–50 µL RNase-free water directly onto the membrane. Let stand 1 min, then centrifuge at ≥8,000×g for 1 min to elute. Repeat elution for higher yield.
detailedSteps.zh: 将柱转移至新的 1.5 mL 无 RNase 管中。直接向膜上加 30–50 µL 无 RNase 水，静置 1 min，≥8,000×g 离心 1 min 洗脱。重复一次可提高产量。

detailedSteps.en: Quantify RNA by NanoDrop (A260/280 ≈ 2.0; A260/230 ≥ 1.8). For accurate downstream quantification, use Qubit RNA HS assay. Store RNA at −80°C.
detailedSteps.zh: NanoDrop 定量（A260/280 ≈ 2.0；A260/230 ≥ 1.8）。精确定量建议 Qubit RNA HS。−80°C 保存。

note.en: Eluted RNA can be stored at −80°C for up to 1 year. Aliquot into single-use volumes to avoid repeated freeze-thaw cycles.
note.zh: 洗脱后的 RNA 可在 −80°C 保存最多 1 年。建议分装成单次用量以避免反复冻融。
